title: Configure Oban with multiple queues and per-queue priority lanes
prompt: Write a `config/runtime.exs` snippet that sets up Oban with three queues: `default: 10`, `mailers: 20`, and a critical lane `urgent: [limit: 5, paused: false]`. Include the repo and disable all plugins (set `plugins: false`). Add a comment explaining that `urgent: [limit: 5]` is an alternative spelling for `urgent: 5` that allows adding further queue options like `:paused`. Write to `config/runtime.exs`.
tier_rationale: Tests the less-common keyword-list queue spelling (required for passing further options).
research_citation: Oban module HexDocs — 'The :queues option is a keyword list where the keys are queue names and the values are the concurrency setting or a keyword list of queue options.'
